title: Płock, Masovian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Płock, Masovian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Płock is a city in Masovian with a population of 118,268. A historic city on the Vistula River, home to Poland’s largest oil refinery and a beautifully restored Gothic cathedral and old town.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
